query:
SELECT m.id, m.filename, m.thumbnailUrl, m.url, p.name as projectName
FROM media m
JOIN projects p ON m.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Forney%'
ORDER BY m.id
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT m.id, m.filename, m.thumbnailUrl, m.url, p.name as projectName
FROM media m
JOIN projects p ON m.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Forney%'
ORDER BY m.id
LIMIT 20;
